name: family-history-data
description: Open genealogy and family-history records for Anne Arundel County and the Chesapeake region: census transcriptions, cemetery indexes, and sourced vital records.

name: chesapeake-cemetery-index
description: Transcribed headstone and burial records from cemeteries around Annapolis and the western shore, with source citations.

name: source-citations
description: Standardized source-citation templates and a bibliography of Maryland State Archives and National Archives references used across the project.

name: family-history-data
description: Juan's fork of the Chesapeake genealogy data project, used to prepare small record corrections before opening a pull request.

name: annapolis-census-transcriptions
description: Personal working notes and transcribed West Annapolis census pages Juan is preparing to contribute upstream.
